mapper.select: SELECT mr.id AS "id", mr.register_id AS "registerId", mr.diagnosis AS "diagnosis", mr.readme AS "chiefComplaint", mr.present AS "presentIllness", mr.proposal AS "treatmentProposal", COALESCE(mr.allergy, '') AS "allergy" FROM medical_record mr WHERE mr.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY mr.id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT pr.id AS "prescriptionId", pr.register_id AS "registerId", pr.drug_id AS "drugId", d.drug_name AS "drugName", d.drug_format AS "drugFormat", d.drug_unit AS "drugUnit", d.drug_dosage AS "drugDosage", d.manufacturer AS "manufacturer", pr.drug_usage AS "drugUsage", pr.drug_number AS "drugNumber", pr.creation_time AS "creationTime", 'prescription' AS "source" FROM prescription pr INNER JOIN drug_info d ON d.id = pr.drug_id WHERE pr.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY pr.creation_time DESC, pr.id DESC

SELECT d.id AS "diseaseId", d.disease_name AS "diseaseName", d.diseaseicd AS "diseaseIcd", d.disease_category AS "diseaseCategory", COALESCE(mr.diagnosis, d.disease_name) AS "diagnosisText", mr.proposal AS "treatmentDirection", 'medical_record' AS "source" FROM medical_record mr LEFT JOIN medical_record_disease mrd ON mrd.medical_record_id = mr.id LEFT JOIN disease d ON d.id = mrd.disease_id WHERE mr.register_id = #{registerId} ORDER BY d.id NULLS LAST
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follow_up_last_visit_snapshot ( register_id, visit_date, diagnosis_summary, professional_metrics, doctor_name, department_name, source_medical_record_id, prescription_summary ) VALUES ( #{registerId}, #{visitDate}, #{diagnosisSummary}, COALESCE(#{professionalMetricsJson}::jsonb, '{}'::jsonb), #{doctorName}, #{departmentName}, #{sourceMedicalRecordId}, COALESCE(#{prescriptionSummaryJson}::jsonb, '[]'::jsonb) ) ON CONFLICT (register_id) DO UPDATE SET visit_date = EXCLUDED.visit_date, diagnosis_summary = COALESCE(NULLIF(EXCLUDED.diagnosis_summary, ''), follow_up_last_visit_snapshot.diagnosis_summary), professional_metrics = CASE WHEN EXCLUDED.professional_metrics IS NOT NULL AND EXCLUDED.professional_metrics <> '{}'::jsonb THEN EXCLUDED.professional_metrics ELSE follow_up_last_visit_snapshot.professional_metrics END, doctor_name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.doctor_name, follow_up_last_visit_snapshot.doctor_name), department_name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.department_name, follow_up_last_visit_snapshot.department_name), source_medical_record_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.source_medical_record_id, follow_up_last_visit_snapshot.source_medical_record_id), prescription_summary = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.prescription_summary, follow_up_last_visit_snapshot.prescription_summary), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
